title: The Ljung-Box Test Procedure
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process for applying the Ljung-Box Q-test to check for autocorrelation in time series residuals.
elements: Compare Q to Chi-Square Critical Value
Decision: Fail to Reject Null Hypothesis (No Significant Autocorrelation)
relationships: Process flow from residuals through autocorrelation calculation, statistic computation, hypothesis testing, and final decision outcome
